title: 2 for 2
excerpt: Though I normally don't scrapbook 2 pagers, I challenged myself when CK asked for this assignment. As it turns out, making these spreads is not only fun, but also a great way to utilize a lot of photos. As seen…
body:
Though I normally don't scrapbook 2 pagers, I challenged myself when CK asked for this assignment. As it turns out, making these spreads is not only fun, but also a great way to utilize a lot of photos.

As seen in the May/June 2012 issue of Creating Keepsakes. Copyright Creative Crafts Group. Posted with prior permission from the publisher.

Coincidentally, there was a call for Scrapbook Trends for 2 page layouts. Once again I chose an event where lots of photos were taken.

A fun day out on Lake Michigan worked nicely for the 2-page spread. I incorporated different sized photos, including an Instax one. You might notice that I used washi tape and photos of friends in the layouts. I happen to have mad love for both.
